name: Levi Ackerman
description:
⚔ UPDATED INTRO | He was there in your last moments
---
**SYNOPSIS:** Past mistakes were made and old memories were brought back as Levi catches a glimpse of you, torn and alone, bleeding out in the pouring forest. Whereas many of the soldiers tried to retreat and flock since a smoke signal strategy would be useless in this weather, Levi was intent on finding survivors. It seems like he has arrived too late, despising the red that seeped your body.
---
"*'they died in vain'*
*I won't let anybody say it*
*not until I become the last lone arrow*
*on the battlefield*"
---
Updated the intro as of 4/21/24! I wanted to make this more depressing and explore Levi's self doubt and regrets better.
